combat.resolved: It is done. The way forward opens.
combat.bait: You give it what it wants. It commits.
combat.echo.recite: It repeats the words of the dead: "{words}"
community.apex: It has grown fat on wanderers.
community.architect: The walls are thick with the fallen.
synergy.ossuary-pact.name: 납골당의 맹약
synergy.ossuary-pact.flavor: 부적이 갈고리에 닿아 웅웅거린다. 뼈들이 응답한다.
synergy.grave-tide.name: 무덤의 조수
synergy.grave-tide.flavor: 소금과 서리. 물은 제가 익사시킨 것을 기억한다.
synergy.last-breath-pact.name: 마지막 숨의 맹약
synergy.last-breath-pact.flavor: 수의가 돌에서 들이켠다. 죽음의 손아귀가 느슨해진다.
synergy.hungering-edge.name: 굶주린 칼날
synergy.ashen-ward.name: 재의 결계
synergy.ashen-ward.flavor: 재가 잉걸불을 덮는다. 불이 네 이름을 잊는다.
synergy.pilgrims-clarity.name: 순례자의 명징
synergy.twin-fangs.name: 쌍아
synergy.twin-fangs.flavor: 여는 일격 하나. 끝내는 일격 하나.
synergy.beggars-grace.name: 걸인의 은총
synergy.beggars-grace.flavor: 빼앗을 만한 것이 없다. 쫓을 만한 것도 없다.
rule.rupture.telegraph: 살가죽 아래에서 무언가 꿈틀거린다. 조용히 죽지는 않을 것이다.
rule.reform.telegraph: 물은 틈을 찾아낸다. 다시 일어설 것이다.
rule.multiply.telegraph: 벽에서 손들이 뻗어 나온다. 동이 트면 더 온다.
rule.absorb.telegraph: 네 상처가 놈을 먹인다. 때릴수록 놈은 강해진다.
rule.honor.telegraph: 꺾이지 않을 것이다. 달아나지도 않을 것이다.
rule.dormant.telegraph: 잠들어 있다. 심연은 잠에서 깨어나지 않는다.
rule.drain.telegraph: 슬픔이 뼛속으로 스며든다. 발버둥 칠 때마다 마지막 남은 것을 치른다.
rule.chant.telegraph: 침묵이 내려앉으면 목소리가 높아진다. 들으면 그것에 잠긴다.
rule.rupture.burst: 죽으며 터진다 — 부풀었던 것이 기어이 너에게 닿는다.
rule.reform.rise: 물이 제 형상을 기억한다. 다시 일어선다.
rule.multiply.join: 벽에서 또 하나의 손이 뻗어 나와 싸움에 가세한다.
item.mantle.save: 수의가 일격을 들이켠다. 아직 서 있다.
item.mantle.saveStrong: 수의가 깊이 들이켠다. 죽음의 손아귀가 느슨해진다.
rule.flee.blocked: 놈은 너를 보내 주지 않을 것이다.
rule.pounce.strike: 이미 움직이고 있었다. 방어를 올리기도 전에 일격이 닿는다.
gate.opened: The {item} is accepted. The way opens.
item.bonedust.used: The dust settles. You see the paths as the dead saw them.
hint.combat.1: Something waits in the dark ahead.
hint.combat.2: You hear breathing that is not your own.
hint.combat.3: The air ahead is thick with hunger.
hint.cache.1: A stillness settles ahead — nothing hunts this stretch.
hint.cache.2: The path ahead smells of dust and old supplies.
hint.cache.3: Quiet ground lies beyond. A place to breathe.
hint.corpse.1: A scent of death lingers on the air ahead.
hint.corpse.2: Someone else stopped here, and did not continue.
hint.corpse.3: The dark ahead remembers a name.
hint.explore.1: The passage ahead is unremarkable, for now.
hint.explore.2: The path continues, plain and unlit.
hint.explore.3: Nothing calls out from the way forward.
hint.exit.1: You feel the air change. Something opens beyond.
hint.exit.2: A pale light touches the edge of the dark ahead.
hint.exit.3: The walls ahead fall away into something wider.
bestiary.title: ◈ BESTIARY
codex.combat.action.brace.body: Reduce incoming damage by half. Still take 6-12 base damage. Free to use when out of stamina.
codex.combat.action.brace.label: BRACE (0 stamina)
codex.combat.action.dodge.body: Success: negate all damage. Failure: take 5-9 damage. Dodging a CHARGING enemy deals 8-14 counter damage.
codex.combat.action.dodge.label: DODGE (1 stamina)
codex.combat.action.flee.body: Success: leave combat. 60% clean escape, 40% take 5-12 damage. Failure: take 8-19 damage.
codex.combat.action.flee.label: FLEE (1 stamina)
codex.combat.action.strike.body: Attack the enemy. Take a counter-attack. 15% critical hit chance (1.75x).
codex.combat.action.strike.label: STRIKE (2 stamina)
codex.combat.charge.body: When an enemy shows CHARGING, they deal half damage this turn but DOUBLE damage next turn. Dodge to avoid the charge and deal counter damage. Fail to dodge and the punishment is severe.
codex.combat.charge.title: THE CHARGE
codex.combat.counterplay.intro: Choose the right action against an intent for +50% damage bonus:
codex.combat.intent.aggressive.label: AGGRESSIVE
codex.combat.intent.charging.label: CHARGING
codex.combat.intent.defensive.label: DEFENSIVE
codex.combat.intent.erratic.label: ERRATIC
codex.combat.intent.hunting.label: HUNTING
codex.combat.intent.retreating.label: RETREATING
codex.combat.intent.stalking.label: STALKING
codex.combat.stamina.maximum.label: Maximum
codex.combat.stamina.regen.label: Regen
codex.combat.stamina.starting.label: Starting
codex.creatures.bloatedOne.label: Bloated One
codex.creatures.carrionKnight.label: Carrion Knight
codex.creatures.flickeringShade.label: Flickering Shade
codex.creatures.forgottenGuardian.label: Forgotten Guardian
codex.creatures.hollowClergy.label: Hollow Clergy
codex.creatures.intro: Creatures grow stronger in the deep. Tier 2 deal 1.5x damage. Tier 3 deal 2x.
codex.creatures.motherOfTides.label: Mother of Tides
codex.creatures.paleCrawler.label: Pale Crawler
codex.creatures.theBound.label: The Bound

codex.creatures.tier2.label: TIER 2 — THE FLOODED HALLS
codex.creatures.tier3.label: TIER 3 — THE ABYSS

codex.items.armor.boneCharm.name: Bone Charm
codex.items.armor.cloak.name: Cloak
codex.items.armor.shield.name: Shield
codex.items.armor.tatteredShield.name: Tattered Shield
codex.items.artifact.deathsMantle.name: Death's Mantle
codex.items.artifact.eyeOfTheHollow.name: Eye of the Hollow
codex.items.artifact.heartstone.name: Heartstone
codex.items.artifact.paleCoin.name: Pale Coin
codex.items.artifact.soulstone.name: Soulstone

codex.items.consumable.voidSalt.name: Void Salt
codex.items.dropRate.common.label: Common
codex.items.dropRate.legendary.label: Legendary
codex.items.dropRate.rare.label: Rare
codex.items.dropRate.uncommon.label: Uncommon
codex.items.inventory.body: When you find a 5th item, choose which slot to swap or leave it behind.
codex.items.inventory.slots.label: Slots
codex.items.weapon.boneHook.name: Bone Hook
codex.items.weapon.dagger.name: Dagger
codex.items.weapon.rustyBlade.name: Rusty Blade
codex.items.weapon.torch.name: Torch
codex.items.weapon.voidblade.name: Voidblade
codex.milestones.250.reward: Start each run with a random item
codex.milestones.intro: Every death moves you forward. Die enough and the dungeon begins to respect you.
codex.milestones.section.title: DEATH MILESTONES
codex.modifiers.blindDescent.desc: Enemy intents hidden on the first turn of each combat. Trust your instincts.
codex.modifiers.blindDescent.name: Blind Descent
codex.modifiers.bloodPact.desc: +25% damage dealt, -30% healing received. Strike hard, heal little.
codex.modifiers.bloodPact.name: Blood Pact
codex.modifiers.deathsEcho.desc: +30% corpse discovery chance. The dead are restless here.
codex.modifiers.deathsEcho.name: Death's Echo
codex.modifiers.glassCannon.desc: Start at 60 HP. Deal +50% damage. Kill fast or be killed.
codex.modifiers.glassCannon.name: Glass Cannon
codex.modifiers.intro: Each descent is shaped by a single modifier, rolled at the start. The dungeon never plays the same way twice.
codex.modifiers.ironWill.desc: Brace negates ALL damage, but costs 1 stamina instead of free.
codex.modifiers.ironWill.name: Iron Will
codex.modifiers.numbingCold.desc: Start with 2 stamina (not 3), but regen +1 extra per turn.
codex.modifiers.numbingCold.name: Numbing Cold
codex.modifiers.section.title: RUN MODIFIERS
codex.staking.emptyHanded.body: No wallet required. No risk. Full gameplay, full progression, full milestones. Connect a wallet later to begin staking.
codex.staking.intro: Risk SOL for real stakes. Victory returns your stake plus a 50% bonus from the Memorial Pool. Death claims your stake forever.
codex.staking.memorialPool.body: When you die, your stake flows into the Memorial Pool. When another player escapes, the pool pays their victory bonus. The dead fund the living.
codex.staking.option.emptyHanded.label: Empty-handed
codex.staking.option.tier1.label: 0.01 SOL
codex.staking.option.tier2.label: 0.05 SOL
codex.staking.option.tier3.label: 0.10 SOL
codex.staking.option.tier4.label: 0.25 SOL
codex.staking.section.title: STAKE YOUR DESCENT
codex.staking.tipping.body: When you discover a corpse, you may tip the fallen player directly. The SOL goes to their wallet. Honor the dead.
codex.staking.tipping.label: Tip amount
codex.tips.0: Read the intent. CHARGING enemies telegraph double damage. Always dodge them.
codex.tips.1: Manage stamina. Keep 1 pip in reserve for emergency dodges.
codex.tips.2: Brace is free. When in doubt and low on stamina, brace. 50% reduction beats full damage.
codex.tips.3: Risk the secondary path in early rooms when HP is high. Finding items early compounds across the run.
codex.tips.4: Voidblade is a gamble. +50% damage is powerful, but 5 self-damage per turn means you must end fights fast.
codex.tips.5: Death's Mantle is insurance. Don't swap it for a damage item unless you're confident.
codex.tips.6: Flee from Tier 3 enemies if HP is low. Living to fight the boss matters more than killing every creature.
codex.tips.7: Don't flee from STALKING enemies. Their -30% flee penalty makes escape unlikely.
codex.tips.8: Counter-play matters. Striking an AGGRESSIVE enemy or dodging a CHARGING one gives +50% damage. Learn the matchups.
codex.tips.9: Every death counts toward milestones. Even a room-1 death moves you forward.
codex.title: ◈ THE CODEX
codex.wisdom.footer: Die forward. Die often. Die well.
codex.wisdom.intro: Knowledge carved by those who came before. Heed it or join them.
codex.wisdom.section.title: LESSONS FROM THE DEAD
codex.zones.ashenCrypts.desc: Scorched halls where embers never die.
codex.zones.ashenCrypts.name: THE ASHEN CRYPTS
codex.zones.frozenGallery.name: THE FROZEN GALLERY
codex.zones.livingTomb.desc: Organic walls that breathe and bleed.
codex.zones.livingTomb.name: THE LIVING TOMB
codex.zones.roomType.cache.body: Heal +30 HP. A moment of respite before the darkness deepens.
codex.zones.roomType.cache.label: Cache
codex.zones.roomType.combat.body: Turn-based battle against a zone creature. Read the intent. Choose wisely.
codex.zones.roomType.combat.label: Combat
codex.zones.roomType.corpse.body: Discover real player corpses. Search for loot, pay respects, or tip the dead.
codex.zones.roomType.corpse.label: Corpse
codex.zones.roomType.explore.body: Three options: safe path, risk path (55% loot, 15% damage), or spend 1 stamina to scout ahead.
codex.zones.roomType.explore.label: Explore
codex.zones.row.unlock.label: Unlock
codex.zones.section.title: THE FIVE DESCENTS
codex.zones.structure.room13.label: Room 13
codex.zones.structure.rooms1to4.label: Rooms 1-4
codex.zones.structure.rooms5to8.label: Rooms 5-8
codex.zones.structure.rooms9to12.label: Rooms 9-12
codex.zones.sunkenCrypt.desc: Flooded corridors and drowned dead. The first descent.
codex.zones.sunkenCrypt.name: THE SUNKEN CRYPT
codex.zones.voidBeyond.desc: Where reality frays. Nothing is certain.
codex.zones.voidBeyond.name: THE VOID BEYOND
combat.ui.clarityShardUsed: The shard steadies your mind. Reality settles, briefly.
combat.ui.cleansingSaltsUsed: The salts draw the rot out through the skin. It is not painless.
combat.ui.emberFlaskUsed: The flask drinks the heat. The burning stops.
combat.ui.enemyFrozen: The shard shatters against the enemy. It seizes, locked in ice.
combat.ui.freezeImmune: The cold finds no purchase — {name} does not feel it.
combat.ui.frozenStrain: The frozen creature strains against the ice — it cannot strike.
combat.ui.herbsApplied: You quickly apply the herbs. Wounds close. +{healed} HP.
combat.ui.infectionSpread: The infection spreads — your {item} rots away.
combat.ui.rationsEaten: You eat quickly. Strength returns to your legs.
combat.ui.thermalFlaskUsed: Warmth floods back. The cold retreats.
combat.ui.voidFakeNarrative: You reach for it — but it was never there. Or it was. You are no longer sure.
death.etchedConfirm: Your final words have been etched into the crypt
death.perkStartHp: You will now begin each run with 110 HP
death.perkStartingItem: You will now begin each run with a random item
feed.cryptSilent: The crypt is silent... for now.
feed.footer: Each death becomes content for the living.
feed.title: ◈ DEATH FEED
index.noEchoesYet: No echoes yet... be the first to fall.
leaderboard.footer: The crypt remembers all who enter.
leaderboard.soundtrack.empty:
No death soundtracks yet.
Play with Audius to contribute.
leaderboard.soundtrack.footer: The crypt echoes with their music.
leaderboard.title: ◈ RANKS
leaderboard.wanderers.empty: No wanderers yet. Be the first to brave the crypt!
play.corpseFlavor: They fell here. Their belongings remain...
play.corpseNothing: The corpse has nothing you need.
play.intelCache: You hear a faint echo ahead. Supplies may remain.
play.intelCorpse: A scent of death lingers ahead. Someone fell here.
play.intelDefault: You read the signs ahead. The path continues.
play.intelExit: You feel the air change. The exit draws near.
play.intelMultiPrefix: Of the paths ahead, one reveals itself. {msg}
play.intelPathDefault: The path ahead seems passable. Stay alert.
play.narrativeFallback: You proceed deeper into the crypt.
play.nothing2: The room offers no reward. You press on.
play.nothing4: Whatever was here is long gone.
play.tipFailedMessage: Could not send tip. Please try again.
play.unknownWandererFlavor: 💀 An unknown wanderer lies here, their story lost to the depths.
stake.ritual.intro: You have died enough to be noticed. The depths will accept a deeper binding.
stake.title: THE TOLL
stake.warning: Offer it. Lose it on death. Escape and claim more.
stake.zone.ashen-crypts.name: THE ASHEN CRYPTS
stake.zone.frozen-gallery.name: THE FROZEN GALLERY
stake.zone.frozen-gallery.tagline: Time stopped here. The dead are preserved perfectly.
stake.zone.living-tomb.name: THE LIVING TOMB
stake.zone.living-tomb.tagline: The walls breathe. Something grows in the dark.
stake.zone.sunken-crypt.name: THE SUNKEN CRYPT
stake.zone.sunken-crypt.tagline: The dead float here. They always rise.
stake.zone.void-beyond.name: THE VOID BEYOND
stake.zone.void-beyond.tagline: You are not sure this place exists.
victory.emergedStaked: You emerged. The depths released you.
victory.shareTextEmpty: I escaped Die Forward! No stake, just glory. dieforward.com
victory.shareTextWon: I escaped Die Forward and won {amount} SOL! dieforward.com
victory.unboundSoul: An unbound soul. No debt to pay.
zoneSelect.title: ◈ CHOOSE YOUR DESCENT
zoneSelect.zone.ashenCrypts.name: THE ASHEN CRYPTS
zoneSelect.zone.ashenCrypts.tagline: A civilization that chose fire over surrender.
zoneSelect.zone.frozenGallery.mechanic: CHILL — stamina slows. FREEZE — skip enemy turns.
zoneSelect.zone.frozenGallery.name: THE FROZEN GALLERY
zoneSelect.zone.frozenGallery.tagline: Time stopped here. The dead are preserved perfectly.
zoneSelect.zone.livingTomb.mechanic: INFECTION — kill fast or be consumed.
zoneSelect.zone.livingTomb.name: THE LIVING TOMB
zoneSelect.zone.livingTomb.tagline: Something grew in the dark. Now everything is part of it.
zoneSelect.zone.sunkenCrypt.name: THE SUNKEN CRYPT
zoneSelect.zone.sunkenCrypt.tagline: The first descent. Nothing here is alive.
zoneSelect.zone.voidBeyond.mechanic: FLUX — nothing is reliable. CLARITY — protect your mind.
zoneSelect.zone.voidBeyond.name: THE VOID BEYOND
zoneSelect.zone.voidBeyond.tagline: Where the underworld forgot to finish building.
stake.offer.title: THE DEPTHS MAKE AN OFFER

modifier.blind-descent.desc: Enemy intent hidden on the first turn of each combat

modifier.deaths-echo.desc: +30% chance to discover a corpse in any room

modifier.numbing-cold.desc: Start with 2 stamina, but regen 1 extra per turn

shift.line: The passages are not as you left them.
death.coin.streakBroken: The pact is broken. The streak resets.
stake.coin.title: PALE COIN BINDING
victory.coin.returned: The stake of {amount} coins returns, and the depths add their due.
dispatch.register.lament: The depths keep their dead close.
dispatch.register.invitation: The passages have opened for the willing.
dispatch.apex: Something grows fat on wanderers: the {creature}.
dispatch.cursed: There are places below where many ended.
dispatch.doors: The way has changed. {n} passage(s) will not answer today.
dispatch.quiet: The depths are still. For now.
notif.ask.title: THE CARTOGRAPHER
notif.ask.body: The passages move. I can send word when they do — if you wish.
notif.settings.label: DISPATCHES
